creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://forums.FreeBSD.org/threads/82247/post-533935> expresses a requirement for procfs that is not yet expressed in the package messages for wine and wine-devel. 


<https://www.freshports.org/emulators/wine/#message>
<https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/emulators/wine/files/pkg-message.in>

<https://www.freshports.org/emulators/wine-devel/#message>
<https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/emulators/wine-devel/files/pkg-message.in>

----

Compare with the expressions at: 

<https://www.freshports.org/emulators/i386-wine/#message>
<https://www.freshports.org/emulators/i386-wine-devel/#message>
